notes: Phone: remove the DUPLICATE 録画 (record) button (2026-06). Phones were showing two identical 録画 buttons — one in the bottom cbar (#btnViewRec, kept there since the 日照/録画 phone-cbar change) and a second mirror in the top camera row (#btnViewRecPhone). The top mirror predates the cbar carrying 録画 on phones and was never removed. Now #btnViewRecPhone is kept hidden on every tier, so the single 録画 lives in the cbar (📷カメラ / ☀日照 / 📐測定 / ⏺録画) with the other view tools. The top phone row is now just 🏠リセット / 📱AR (+ 画質 badge). Builds on v0.0.13.
